query: multiple exposure layered scenes blended frames analog film
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: multiple exposure layered scenes

response.objective_caption: A group portrait of several men standing together, one with long hair and a full beard wearing glasses positioned in the right foreground, others layered behind him wearing casual button-down shirts and plaid patterns, with mathematical equations and formulas faintly visible as an overlaid textual element across the left and center portions of the frame, all rendered in monochromatic blue tones against a dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A ghostly multiple-exposure portrait where several men blur and overlap into translucent layered figures, their faces and bodies smeared by motion blur and double-exposure effects that leave only the bearded man with glasses partially resolved in the right foreground while others dissolve into spectral streaks, all suffocating under crushed low-contrast blue tones that drain warmth and vitality from the scene; mathematical formulas are faintly superimposed like hallucinated text, deepening the oppressive melancholic atmosphere of fragmented identity and anxious disintegration.
